title: vernonia hymenolepis subsp. leucocalyx
intro: Vernonia hymenolepis subsp. leucocalyx is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae), native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Vernonia hymenolepis subsp. leucocalyx include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat infections, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Vernonia hymenolepis subsp. leucocalyx is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts are also used in various herbal preparations, including creams and ointments.
